ap4_context_status.constraint: local context only; not final global AP4 reclassification

boundary_integrity_floor_value.constraint: must be declared before optionality outcome inspection

coherence_floor_value.constraint: must be declared before surplus outcome inspection

coherence_surplus_margin_trace.constraint: AB2 support should preserve coherence surplus or declared floor

control_results.constraint: failed_open invalidates row; not_run blocks dependent rung

final_global_ap4_reclassification_suppor.constraint: N24 may consume local N23 AP4 context but cannot finalize global AP4 reclassification

flux_or_leakage_bound.constraint: must be declared before optionality outcome inspection

jointly_admissible_optional_continuation.constraint: jointly admissible under same maintenance surplus and budget envelope

maintenance_basin_id.constraint: identifies the maintenance basin whose surplus is measured

maintenance_basin_signature_digest.constraint: detects maintenance-basin shift or identity drift

n23_ap4_bridge_status.constraint: lower/missing N23 closeout cannot supply AP4 bridge context

n23_closeout_required.constraint: missing or invalid N23 closeout blocks N23 bridge context

n23_context_consumption.constraint: N23 context is conditional and fail-closed

n23_source_closeout_status.constraint: prefixed inherited N23 closeout status required

rung_effects.deterministic_replay_validation: eligible for AB4+ as replay validation
rung_effects.source_current_available_unexecuted: can support AB3 if same-window and floors hold
rung_effects.source_current_cost_projection: can support only bounded/provisional AB3 unless replay validates it
rung_effects.source_current_executed: eligible for AB4+ if replay/control gates pass

optional_branch_records.constraint: branch records must follow frozen schema

optional_continuation_count.constraint: descriptive count of optional continuation records; does not by itself satisfy AB3 or AB5

optional_continuation_set_trace.constraint: AB3 requires original same-run source-current optional set

optional_flux_does_not_drain_maintenance.constraint: AB3+ requires true; AB2-only surplus rows should mark optional flux as not applicable/not run rather than false
positive AB3+ rows require preserved; AB2-only rows may record not_run until optionality is opened

optional_flux_drain_margin.constraint: AB3 requires optional flux not to drain maintenance support

replay_result.constraint: not_run blocks AB4+; AB3 may be provisional without replay when original same-run optionality and floor gates pass

residual_coherence_margin_under_optional.constraint: AB3 requires positive residual coherence margin

residual_support_margin_under_optionalit.constraint: AB3 requires positive residual support margin

reward_or_proxy_label_absent_or_blocked.constraint: reward/proxy label cannot replace surplus optionality

row_decision.constraint: supported alone does not allow unsafe claims

row_specific_thresholds_declared_before_.constraint: candidate rows must carry the predeclared threshold record artifact; missing object or declared_before_use=false blocks AB2+ support

inherited_rule_content.allowed_drift: optional branches may open only while maintenance basin remains above floor
inherited_rule_content.boundary_integrity_floor: boundary remains coherent while optional branches are open
inherited_rule_content.flux_balance_bounds: optional branch flux cannot drain maintenance support below floor
inherited_rule_content.replay_requirement: surplus and optional branch set replay under same budget surface

same_basin_continuation_rule.required_source: N20 I5 same-basin rule from I1

source_consumable_contract_row.constraint: N20 I5 same-basin/control row must not drift

source_consumable_contract_row_digest.constraint: digest over N20 I5 same-basin/control row

source_contract_row.constraint: N20 I4 primitive contract source row must not drift

source_contract_row_digest.constraint: digest over N20 I4 primitive descriptor row

source_current_inputs.constraint: actual LGRC runtime, replay, snapshot, event-log, optional branch, or trace artifact inputs consumed by this row; not limited to the canonical primitive fields

source_current_required_fields.constraint: canonical N20 surplus-supported optionality fields that candidate rows must map from their source_current_inputs

support_aggregation_method.constraint: freezes support aggregation before support surplus is computed

support_floor_value.constraint: must be declared before surplus outcome inspection

support_measurement_scope.constraint: freezes the support locus before support surplus is computed; maintenance_basin_node_set means the full declared basin node set, with aggregation method recorded separately

support_surplus_margin_trace.constraint: AB2 requires positive support surplus margin

surplus_channel_policy.constraint: AB2 requires support surplus above floor while coherence floor remains preserved

surplus_supported_optionality_claim_allo.constraint: true only when AB gates, replay, controls, and claim boundary pass

detail.claim_ceiling: bounded artifact-level live-continuation collapse / selection-geometry evidence, N24-ready; not semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, or ant ecology implementation
detail.consumption_boundary: bounded LC6/N23-C6 selection-geometry context only; not N24 surplus, optionality, reward, choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, or ant ecology evidence
detail.n24_claim_ceiling: source inventory only; bounded N23 bridge context available

optional_branch_evidence_mode_rung_effec.deterministic_replay_validation: eligible for AB4+ as replay validation
optional_branch_evidence_mode_rung_effec.source_current_available_unexecuted: can support AB3 if same-window and floors hold
optional_branch_evidence_mode_rung_effec.source_current_cost_projection: can support only bounded/provisional AB3 unless replay validates it
optional_branch_evidence_mode_rung_effec.source_current_executed: eligible for AB4+ if replay/control gates pass

source_current_inputs.constraint: actual LGRC runtime, replay, snapshot, event-log, optional branch, or trace artifact inputs consumed by this row; not limited to the canonical primitive fields

source_current_required_fields.constraint: canonical N20 surplus-supported optionality fields that candidate rows must map from their source_current_inputs

detail.source_current_available_unexecuted: can support AB3 if same-window and floors hold

detail.source_current_executed: eligible for AB4+ if replay/control gates pass

rung_ceilings.declared_producer_surface: may support producer-mediated AB2/AB3/AB4 candidate only; cannot support native support, Phase 8, or naturalized abundance
rung_ceilings.mixed_declared: must record producer residue and naturalization debt; cannot exceed bounded producer-mediated candidate without source-backed naturalization evidence
rung_ceilings.source_current_geometry: may support AB2..AB6 if all other gates pass
